patterns.description: A concentration of 3 bodies in Aries, intensifying the Fire/Cardinal signature.
A concentration of 3 bodies in Taurus, intensifying the Earth/Fixed signature.
A concentration of 3 bodies in Capricorn, intensifying the Earth/Cardinal signature.
A concentration of 3 bodies in Sagittarius, intensifying the Fire/Mutable signature.
A concentration of 3 bodies in Aquarius, intensifying the Air/Fixed signature.
Dynamic tension between Moon and Saturn discharges through Uranus (the apex) — a powerful engine of motivated growth.
A concentration of 4 bodies in Pisces, intensifying the Water/Mutable signature.
